program:
check val = if val > 84 { err "limit" } else { val }

lines = fs.read "data.txt" ? "alice 10\nbob 30\ncarol 50"
entries = lines.lines | map line -> {
  parts = line.split " "
  name = parts[0]
  num = parts[1].int
  (name, num)
}

print "--- arithmetic ---"
result = 3 + 84.5
print "3 + 84.5 = {result}"

print "--- aggregation ---"
total = entries | map x -> x.1 | sum
print "names: {entries | map x -> x.0 | join ', '}"
print "total: {total}"
avg = total.float / entries.len.float
print "average: {avg}"

print "--- match with err ---"
tests = [42, 84, 85, 100, 10]
for val in tests {
  outcome = match (check val) {
    err e -> "rejected {val}: {e}"
    int n -> "accepted {n}"
  }
  print outcome
}
